name: JenniNexus Tag System
description: Tag filtering system with centralized API (tag-filter-api.js) for synchronized state between offcanvas, page buttons, and URL. Supports multi-select and card previews. Fully integrated across all pages.
architecture: Client-side JavaScript + PHP rendering. Core: tag-filter-api.js (state), tag-system.js (UI/Logic), youtube-grid.js (rendering). Data: tags.json + content_tags.json (generated from YAML).
versionNotes: v6.6 (2025-11-19): Created tag-filter-api.js for centralized state management. Updated gamedev.php to use API. Archived outdated scripts (import-youtube-tags.js). v6.5: Consistency audit. v6.4: RSS detection.

core.description: Core tag system files - required for all tag functionality

files.description: Single source of truth - all tag definitions
Maps content IDs to tags - generated by generate-playlist-tags.ps1

scripts_generation.description: PowerShell scripts for tag generation and maintenance

files.description: PRIMARY: Scans YAML files, extracts tags, updates content_tags.json
Analyzes tag usage across YAML files

client_javascript.description: Client-side JavaScript for tag filtering and UI

files.description: Central API (window.tagFilter) for shared filter state
Offcanvas filter panel, multi-tag selection, applies filters via API

php_pages.description: PHP pages that display tags and filtered content

files.description: Main tag index - shows all 198 tags, multi-select filtering, card previews
Individual tag pages with card previews, supports multi-tag URLs
PHP include for rendering tag cloud (if used server-side)
files.note: May be legacy - JS version preferred

files.description: Tag-specific theme colors and badge styles

yaml_sources.description: YAML files that contain tags - source for content_tags.json generation

header_integration.description: Tag filter offcanvas in site header

files.description: Contains tag filter offcanvas panel markup (Bootstrap 5.3.8)
files.note: Tag offcanvas is part of header, loaded on all pages

legacy_files.description: Generated files - may be legacy or backup

files.status: check if used - may be backup of content_tags.json
check if used - may be backup of tags.json

workflow.1_update_yaml: Edit gaming.yaml, diy.yaml, etc. - add/update playlist tags
workflow.2_ensure_definitions: Verify all tags used in YAML exist in tags.json (or add them)
workflow.4_verify: Check content_tags.json updated with new playlist mappings

critical_rules: ALL tags in YAML files MUST exist in tags.json or filtering breaks
NEVER manually edit content_tags.json - regenerate with PowerShell script
Always use tag slugs in code (e.g., 'gaming'), not IDs (e.g., 1)
Run generate-playlist-tags.ps1 after ANY YAML changes

integration_points.home_page: index.php - Offcanvas filter panel redirects to /tags.php?filters=...
integration_points.gamedev_page: gamedev.php - Loads tag-system.js for playlist filtering
integration_points.gaming_page: gaming.php - Tag badges on cards link to filtered results
integration_points.diy_page: diy.php - Tag filtering for DIY content
integration_points.youtube_page: youtube.php - Tag filtering for video playlists
